zh.lifeSummary: 當Gospatric of Workington於大約1129年出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Orm son of Ketel51歲，母親Ebrea de Trevers46歲。他於大約1150年與Egeliva結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1179年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gospatric of Workington于大约1129年出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Orm son of Ketel51岁，母亲Ebrea de Trevers46岁。他于大约1150年与Egeliva结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1179年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Workington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire): habitational name from Wormington in Gloucestershire or Berry Wormington in Stanton (also Gloucestershire). Perhaps also from Warmington in Northamptonshire. The placenames derive from an Old English personal name Wyrma + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gospatric of Workington was born about 1129, in Cumberland, England, his father, Orm son of Ketel, was 51 and his mother, Ebrea de Trevers, was 46. He married Egeliva about 1150. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died after 1179, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gospatric of Workington est né environ 1129, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Orm son of Ketel, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Ebrea de Trevers, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Egeliva environ 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé après 1179, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gospatric of Workington um 1129 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Orm son of Ketel 51 und seine Mutter Ebrea de Trevers 46. Er hat um 1150 Egeliva geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb nach 1179 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gospatric of Workington è nato il circa 1129 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Orm son of Ketel, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Ebrea de Trevers, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Egeliva circa 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì dopo il 1179, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Cumberland, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランド
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Gospatric of Workingtonが約1129年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Orm son of Ketelは51歳，母Ebrea de Treversは46歳であった。約1150年にEgelivaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1179年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gospatric of Workington(이)가 대략 1129년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Orm son of Ketel(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Ebrea de Trevers(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 Egeliva(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1179년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gospatric of Workington nasceu aproximadamente 1129, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Orm son of Ketel, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Ebrea de Trevers, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Egeliva aproximadamente 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1179, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gospatric of Workington родился около 1129 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Orm son of Ketel было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Ebrea de Trevers, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Egeliva около 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер после 1179 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1129–after 1179: e tusa o le 1129–ina ua ma'ea le 1179

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gospatric of Workington nació aproximadamente 1129, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Orm son of Ketel, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Ebrea de Trevers, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Egeliva aproximadamente 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió después de 1179, en su pueblo.
